parameters.query:
SELECT
  marketing_status,
  COUNT(*) AS lead_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS stalled_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS active_24h
FROM bridge.leads
WHERE marketing_status NOT IN ('Paid','Closed','Rejected')
GROUP BY marketing_status
ORDER BY lead_count DESC;

SELECT
  l.lead_id, l.business_name, l.niche, l.city, l.marketing_status,
  l.updated_at,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - l.updated_at)::int AS days_stalled,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge.outreach_messages o
   WHERE o.lead_id = l.lead_id AND o.direction = 'outbound'
     AND o.sent_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS recent_touches
FROM bridge.leads l
WHERE l.marketing_status IN ('Contacted','Interested','Proposal Sent')
  AND l.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND l.finance_status != 'Paid'
ORDER BY days_stalled DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  outcome, COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(AVG(cro_score)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cro_score,
  ROUND(AVG(actual_revenue_usd)::numeric, 2) AS avg_revenue,
  array_agg(project_name ORDER BY updated_at DESC) FILTER (WHERE project_name IS NOT NULL)
    AS recent_projects
FROM bridge.project_memory
WHERE updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
GROUP BY outcome;

INSERT INTO bridge.agent_memos
  (from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, priority, subject, body_json)
VALUES ('cro', $1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb)
RETURNING memo_id;
